preamble: Affrication and voicing of the voiceless postalveolar fricative [ʃ] to the voiced postalveolar affricate [dʒ].

examples.note: Transition involving the addition of a stop onset and voicing.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
Schenker, A. M. (1995). The Dawn of Slavic.
